positive: A vibrant synthwave portrait of a chrome-plated geometric cityscape at sunset. Features neon grids, palm trees, and a stylized sports car. Aesthetic should be retro-futurism, vaporwave, highly saturated magenta and cyan palette, digital illustration, 80s synthwave album art style.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements
